violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. -Raw pork on a shelf above prepared salads in the walk in cooler. Raw beef above soups and potatoes in the walk in cooler.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Plates on the top shelf out front are not inverted.
